items.question: Where are we on SEO Competitor Gap Enhancements - Project 1?
What are Yasn's comments on PDP page Googlebot required components?
items.answer: The "Birlikte al" component does not already come with most products; we had not taken any action on this because it would have significantly extended the work. In a moment, @ilhan.oztozlu will move it back to the QA environment, and you can check it again.

items.question: What happens to a URL if a category is closed? We discussed this with the Mordor team. What is the latest update here?
items.answer: Murat is working with the Mordor team to clarify the current workflow for deprecated category pages. There are two cases: (1) the page is redirected to the parent category, or (2) it returns a 404. It is not yet clear which case applies in each situation. Murat will update here.

items.question: Where are we on the "Adding URL to Home Page" task?
The Hydra URL manager returns randomized-like responses on API calls. This should be fixed. Ask Ünsal to fix it.
items.answer: Hierarchy Revision - Case 1: The implementation continues. Doğa completed the Varnish-related implementations. On the Hydra redirection topic, we do not want to be blocked by these implementations, and we need to make another implementation for this on the Hydra side.
